meta.note: total_comments_analyzed = non-empty, non-bot comments. admin_comments filtered by LLM classification (short acks, boilerplate notices, tracking bug openers). Coverage = bugs_oversight/total_bugs. Substantive = bugs_technical_oversight/total_bugs.
